title: The Fall and Rise of Reggie Dinkins
summary: The Fall and Rise of Reggie Dinkins is an American sports mockumentary sitcom created by Robert Carlock and Sam Means for NBC. The series premiered as a midseason entry in the 2025–26 television season on January 18, 2026. In May 2026, the series was renewed for a second season which is slated to premiere on November 2, 2026.
